DistanceTravelled.title: Distance travelled
DistanceTravelled.description: How many miles you have travelled through the slog.

TravelPoints.title: Travel points
TravelPoints.description: The amount of travel points you have. This is calculated from the total distance travelled.

DaysPassed.title: Days passed
DaysPassed.description: The total amount of days that has passed since the start of the game.
